title: McKinsey Forward Program
description: Career acceleration program focused on problem solving, digital & analytics, business fundamentals, leadership, and communication through hands-on projects and peer learning.

details.intro: Career acceleration program focused on problem solving, digital & analytics, business fundamentals, leadership, and communication through hands-on projects and peer learning.

title: IBM Course – 'Mastering Generative AI: Model Foundations and NLP'
description: Introduction to NLP, generative AI, word2vec, N-grams, sequence-to-sequence models, and text generation evaluation.

details.subtitle: 2 weeks, 2 to 3 hours per week
details.intro: I have completed the "Mastering Generative AI: Model Foundations and NLP" course offered by IBM. This course served as an introduction to understanding language in the context of generative AI.

sections.title: Key concepts covered include:
list: The foundations of natural language processing (NLP) and generative AI.
Understanding different linguistic models and neural networks.
Evaluation metrics for assessing the quality of generated text.
Building and training a simple language model.

details.conclusion: This course is part of the professional certificate in generative AI engineering.

title: Management et business online course – 'De l'idée à l'entreprise - agissez maintenant !'
description: Foundations of business, marketing and management to turn ideas into concrete reality.

details.subtitle: 30h
details.intro: I participated in the 'From Idea to Business - Act Now!' training to develop entrepreneurial skills and structure a business creation project.

sections.title: Key points of the training:
list: Idea development: Refining the business idea and value proposition.
Business plan: Market study, financial strategy, and development plan.
Legal and administrative aspects: Legal forms and obligations.
Financing: Exploring sources of financing for companies.

details.conclusion: The training gave me the tools and confidence necessary to launch my business.

title: Harvard Online Courses in Data Science – 'Data Science Machine Learning'
description: Introduction to machine learning basics, cross-validation, popular machine learning algorithms, recommendation systems, and regularization.

details.subtitle: 8 weeks, 4 hours per week
details.intro: I have completed this online course offered by Harvard, which introduced me to the fundamentals of machine learning.

sections.title: Key concepts covered include:
list: Algorithms such as random forests and SVM.

details.conclusion: This course provided me with a solid foundation in machine learning.

title: Harvard Online Courses in Data Science – 'Introduction to Data Science with Python'
description: Hands-on experience with Python programming, data modeling, statistics, and machine learning.

details.subtitle: 8 weeks, 4 hours per week
details.intro: The course focused on practicing Python programming for modeling, statistics, and data storytelling.

sections.title: Key concepts covered include:
list: Utilizing libraries like Pandas, NumPy, and SKLearn.

details.conclusion: This course helped me build a strong foundation in Python for data science.

title: CNRS Online Course – 'Introduction au Deep Learning'
description: Foundations of deep learning, natural language processing (NLP), and generative AI with PyTorch and Keras.

details.intro: This course provided an introduction to deep learning, covering its foundations and societal implications.

sections.title: Key sections of the course:
list: Hands-on practice with PyTorch and Keras 3.
Exploration of recent research in deep learning.

details.conclusion: I am now equipped to practice advanced deep learning techniques.

title: Telecom Paris Online Course – 'Fundamentals of Big Data'
description: Introduction to the basics of big data, covering Python, databases, algebra, and statistics.

details.subtitle: 6 weeks, 4 hours per week
details.intro: Essential foundations in computer science and mathematics to approach data science.
details.conclusion: Provided foundational knowledge necessary for the world of big data.

title: University of Cambridge Online Courses in Finance – 'Foundations of Finance'
description: Foundations of finance, including corporate finance, cash flows, and risk management.

details.subtitle: 5 weeks, 3-5 hours per week
details.intro: A strong foundation in key financial concepts and financial reporting.

sections.title: Key concepts covered include:
list: Money and capital in the financial system.

details.conclusion: Prepared me for real-world financial analysis and decision-making.

title: MIT Online Courses in Finance – 'MITx's Finance MicroMasters® Program'
description: Foundations of modern finance including portfolio theory and asset pricing models.

details.subtitle: 1 year and 4 months, 10-14 per week
details.intro: Comprehensive understanding of modern finance, valuation, and capital budgeting.
details.conclusion: Equipped me with advanced mathematical techniques to solve financial problems.
